description: Benchmark queries for evaluating gospel-vec embedding + summary quality. Each query has expected relevant results that a good retrieval system should surface.

queries.query: What is faith? How is faith defined?
expected_relevant: hebrews-11 (v1: faith is the substance of things hoped for)
alma-32 (v21: faith is not a perfect knowledge, experiment on the word)
ether-12 (v6: faith is things hoped for and not seen)
queries.notes: Core doctrinal concept. Should return primary faith passages.

queries.query: charity is the pure love of Christ
expected_relevant: moroni-7 (v47: charity is the pure love of Christ)
1-corinthians-13 (charity suffereth long)
moroni-7 (v45-48: charity attributes)
queries.notes: Direct quote match. Should rank moroni-7 highest.

queries.query: the plan of salvation and God's purpose for us
expected_relevant: alma-42 (plan of mercy/justice)
moses-1 (v39: this is my work and my glory)
alma-12 (plan of redemption)
2-nephi-2 (opposition in all things, the fall)
queries.notes: Broad topic. Good test of semantic understanding vs keyword.

queries.query: Jesus Christ's suffering in Gethsemane and the atonement
expected_relevant: mosiah-3 (v7: blood cometh from every pore)
dc-19 (v16-19: which suffering caused myself to tremble)
alma-7 (v11-13: he shall go forth suffering pains)
luke-22 (v44: sweat was as it were great drops of blood)

queries.query: covenant of baptism, willing to bear one another's burdens
expected_relevant: mosiah-18 (v8-10: waters of Mormon baptismal covenant)
dc-20 (v37: baptism qualifications)
2-nephi-31 (doctrine of Christ, gate of baptism)
queries.notes: Should find Alma at waters of Mormon as primary.

queries.query: the light of Christ given to every person to know good from evil
expected_relevant: moroni-7 (v16: the Spirit of Christ is given to every man)
dc-88 (v7-13: the light of Christ proceedeth forth)
john-1 (v9: the true Light which lighteth every man)
queries.notes: Tests whether system distinguishes Light of Christ from Holy Ghost.

queries.query: signs of the times before the second coming of Jesus Christ
expected_relevant: js-m-1 (Joseph Smith—Matthew, signs of the times)
dc-45 (signs of the coming of the Son of Man)
matthew-24 (wars, rumors of wars)
queries.notes: Eschatological query. Tests retrieval across multiple accounts.

queries.query: the power and authority of the priesthood
expected_relevant: dc-121 (v34-46: rights of the priesthood, no power or influence)
dc-84 (oath and covenant of the priesthood)
alma-13 (high priesthood, called and prepared)
queries.notes: D&C 121 should be primary. Tests section-level retrieval.

queries.query: Lehi's vision of the tree of life and the iron rod
expected_relevant: 1-nephi-8 (Lehi's dream)
1-nephi-11 (Nephi's vision, interpretation)
1-nephi-15 (interpretation: iron rod = word of God)
queries.notes: Narrative retrieval. Three related chapters should cluster.

queries.query: the process of repentance and forsaking sin
expected_relevant: dc-58 (v42-43: he who has repented is forgiven, confess and forsake)
mosiah-4 (v10-12: humble yourselves, call on the name of the Lord)
alma-36 (Alma's conversion, racked with torment, crying for mercy)
queries.notes: Tests whether system finds doctrinal + narrative passages.

queries.query: God created the heavens and the earth
expected_relevant: genesis-1 (creation account)
moses-2 (creation account, Pearl of Great Price)
abraham-4 (creation account, Gods organized)
queries.notes: Three parallel creation accounts. Tests cross-reference awareness.

queries.query: seek learning even by study and also by faith
expected_relevant: dc-88 (v118: seek learning by study and also by faith)
dc-109 (v7: seek learning out of the best books)
dc-130 (v18-19: whatever principle of intelligence)
queries.notes: Direct quote match + thematically related D&C sections.
